autoEnable.description: The scan types are automatically enabled for new members of your organization.

maxAccountLimitReached.description: Represents whether your organization has reached the maximum Amazon Web Services account limit for Amazon Inspector.

ecrConfiguration.description: Specifies how the ECR automated re-scan duration is currently configured for your environment.

ec2Configuration.description: Specifies how the Amazon EC2 automated scan mode is currently configured for your environment.

delegatedAdmin.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID of the Amazon Inspector delegated administrator.

packagePaths.description: The Amazon Inspector deep inspection custom paths for your account.

orgPackagePaths.description: The Amazon Inspector deep inspection custom paths for your organization.

status.description: The activation status of Amazon Inspector deep inspection in your account.

errorMessage.description: An error message explaining why Amazon Inspector deep inspection configurations could not be retrieved for your account.

filterCriteria.description: The filter criteria associated with the report.

permissions.description: Contains details on the permissions an account has to configure Amazon Inspector.

nextToken.description: A token to use for paginating results that are returned in the response. Set the value of this parameter to null for the first request to a list action. For subsequent calls, use the NextToken value returned from the previous request to continue listing results after the first page.

findings.description: Contains details on the findings in your environment.

members.description: An object that contains details for each member account.

totals.description: An object with details on the total usage for the requested account.

url.description: The URL where a PDF or CSV of the CIS scan report can be downloaded.

nextToken.description: The pagination token from a previous request that's used to retrieve the next page of results.

cluster.description: A unit of work inside of a cluster, which can include metadata about the cluster.

integrationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the code security integration.

name.description: The name of the code security integration.

type.description: The type of repository provider for the integration.

status.description: The current status of the code security integration.

statusReason.description: The reason for the current status of the code security integration.

createdOn.description: The timestamp when the code security integration was created.

lastUpdateOn.description: The timestamp when the code security integration was last updated.

tags.description: The tags associated with the code security integration.

authorizationUrl.description: The URL used to authorize the integration with the repository provider. This is only returned if reauthorization is required to fix a connection issue. Otherwise, it is null.

resource.description: The resource identifier for the code repository that was scanned.

accountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID associated with the scan.

statusReason.description: The reason for the current status of the scan.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the scan was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the scan was last updated.

lastCommitId.description: The identifier of the last commit that was scanned. This is only returned if the scan was successful or skipped.

scanConfigurationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the scan configuration.

configuration.description: The configuration settings for the code security scan.

level.description: The security level for the scan configuration.

scopeSettings.description: The scope settings that define which repositories will be scanned. If the ScopeSetting parameter is ALL the scan configuration applies to all existing and future projects imported into Amazon Inspector.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the scan configuration was created.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp when the scan configuration was last updated.

tags.description: The tags associated with the scan configuration.

reportId.description: The report ID of the software bill of materials (SBOM) report.

format.description: The format of the software bill of materials (SBOM) report.

status.description: The status of the software bill of materials (SBOM) report.

s3Destination.description: Contains details of the Amazon S3 bucket and KMS key used to export findings

filterCriteria.description: Contains details about the resource filter criteria used for the software bill of materials (SBOM) report.
